Saqib Bhatti

MP for Meriden & Solihull East

I'm Saqib Bhatti and it is a great honour to be the MP for Meriden and Solihull East. Here you can find my latest news, campaigns and more about me, including what I stand for and how to contact my office. I'm here to help, regardless of how you voted, so please don't hesitate to get in touch.
